## ERT1.3. Rate of using available airspace structures (PI#11) {#ert1.3.-rate-of-using-available-airspace-structures-pi11 .Heading-2-ER}

SWITZERLAND reports that:

- The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **65.58%** (via available restricted and segregated airspace)

GENEVA ACC

- The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **73%** (via available restricted and segregated airspace)

ZURICH ACC

- The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **64%** (via available restricted and segregated airspace)
